no: Argent77's shaman class overhaul. Install AFTER all shaman kit mods (F&P, Will of the Wisps, etc.) so cn:30 can detect and patch them. Component 30 dynamically scans kitlist.2da — no hardcoded kit names.

conflicts.reason: METweaks' shamanic dance tweak is redundant with A7's Improved Shamanic Dance
conflicts.theirComps: #600 Allow Shamans to move while dancing

conflicts.reason: A7 Improved Shamanic Dance scans kitlist.2da and patches all shaman kits. Install Spiritwalker BEFORE A7 Shamanic Dance.
A7 Improved Shamanic Dance scans kitlist.2da and patches all shaman kits. Install StormCaller BEFORE A7 Shamanic Dance.

new: Negotiate with spirits for enhanced summoning.

sum: A mod for BG:EE, BG2:EE and EET to make the Shaman class more useful.

co.no: Core shamanic dance improvements. Makes Shaman class more viable with better dance mechanics. Required by cn:10 and cn:30.

co.n: Expanded Shamanic Dance for high level characters
co.tp2n: Expanded Shamanic Dance for high level characters
co.no: Expanded dance abilities at high levels. Adds more powerful spirit summons at higher character levels.
Adds Shamanic Pact spell — independent of cn:0. Allows shaman to sacrifice HP to empower spirits. Standalone component.

co.n: Apply Shamanic Dance improvements to Shaman kits
co.tp2n: Apply Shamanic Dance improvements to Shaman kits
co.no: Dynamically patches ALL shaman kits found in kitlist.2da at install time. Works with any mod-added shaman kits (F&P, Will of the Wisps' Witchlight, Spiritwalker, Dreadful Witch, etc.) as long as they are installed BEFORE this component.
Adds shaman-specific items: Soulherder's Staff +2 (Troll Mound), Dancing Shoes (Raelis Shai reward), Shroud of Souls (Kuo-toa priest). Usable by any shaman class/kit. Independent of cn:0.
